description: I am a 52-year-old woman with Type 2 diabetes diagnosed 6 years ago. I take metformin 1000mg twice daily. My last HbA1c was 8.2%. I have early signs of kidney disease. I live in Chicago, Illinois.
I'm 67 years old, male, recently diagnosed with early stage Alzheimer's. I don't take any medications yet. I live in Evanston, Illinois and can travel up to 30 miles.
45 year old man with high blood pressure and high cholesterol. On lisinopril 10mg and atorvastatin 40mg. No other conditions. Based in Oak Park, IL.
I was diagnosed with breast cancer last year, stage 2, HER2 positive. I finished chemotherapy 3 months ago. I'm 48 and female. I'm in Naperville, Illinois.
I have Crohn's disease and I've been on biologics — specifically adalimumab — for 2 years. I'm 33 years old, female. Currently in remission. I live in Chicago.
55-year-old male with Parkinson's disease, diagnosed 3 years ago. Taking carbidopa-levodopa. No cognitive issues. Live in Schaumburg, IL.
I'm a healthy 29-year-old woman looking to participate in any clinical research. No conditions, no medications. I live in Chicago, IL.
71 year old man with heart failure. My ejection fraction is 35%. I'm on carvedilol and furosemide. I have a pacemaker. Live in Joliet, Illinois.
I have lupus and have been on hydroxychloroquine for 4 years. I'm 38 female. Recent flare-up with joint pain and fatigue. In Waukegan, Illinois.
62-year-old man with Type 2 diabetes and obesity. BMI is 34. On insulin glargine and metformin. HbA1c of 9.1%. Never smoked. Chicago area.
